### 📋 Pre-Checklist

🔴 CHECKPOINT — Before modifying repository state
- [ ] Are you on the correct branch? (`git branch` to verify)
- [ ] Is your working tree clean? (`git status` — no uncommitted changes)
- [ ] Have you pulled latest from upstream?
- [ ] Do you have the correct credentials/SSH keys loaded?
→ FAIL any check: ⏹ STOP and resolve first

### 🔄 Fallback / Recovery

| If... | Then... |
|-------|--------|
| Push rejected | `git pull --rebase` then retry |
| Auth fails | Check `gh auth status`, `ssh -T git@github.com` |
| Merge conflict | `git merge --abort`, resolve locally, retry |
| CI failing | Check workflow logs, fix, push again |
| Wrong branch committed | `git reset HEAD~1`, stash, switch branch |
